howItWorks.intro: This spectral wavelength calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Frequency
rules.explanation: Speed of light divided by wavelength.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What is the visible light range?
How are wavelength and frequency related?
faq.a: Inversely: c = wavelength × frequency. Higher frequency means shorter wavelength.
